headline: Kalshi Approved For Margin Trading As Washington State Sues It For Illegal Gambling
summary: Kalshi secures a margin trading license for institutional investors on the same day Washington's attorney general sues the prediction market platform for illegal gambling.

raw.headline: Kalshi Approved For Margin Trading As Washington State Sues It For Illegal Gambling
raw.summary: Kalshi secures a margin trading license for institutional investors on the same day Washington's attorney general sues the prediction market platform for illegal gambling.

headline: NYSE Owner Completes $1.6 Billion Polymarket Stake With $600 Million Cash Injection
summary: Intercontinental Exchange invests $600 million in Polymarket, completing a $1.64 billion stake in the prediction market platform as the sector processes record volumes
